title: Diamond 50 x 12'' Gold & Cream Stars Catering Christmas Crackers with Premium content + 50pcs of party photo booth props on sticks (C4481-2022)
features: Diamond 50 x 12" Gold & Cream Stars Catering Christmas Crackers

Box of 50pcs of approx 12" Deluxe Crackers Handmade crackers with impressive festive colourful design.. Each cracker contains a paper hat, joke and premium content, certain to delight everyone in the party

Including a pack of 50 colourful Christmas party photo booth props on sticks. Great for use in selfies using a frame, in the photo booth or for decorations. Selfie props are ideal for boys and girls of all ages with fun!
Purchase of this box of Christmas Crackers, you may find a golden ticket inside to Win our top prize of 1CT DIAMOND or a special prize - a necklace witth 18K gold (white) DIAMOND pendant, good luck!
description: Diamond 50 x 12" Gold & Cream Stars Catering Christmas & New Year Party Crackers with premium content + 50pcs of party photo booth props on sticks
